description: Routing variant: max-throughput (as_of 2026-07-11). Cheapest legs that hold the floors the dial can never lower: strong_reasoning stays on a strong-tier model for plan/minimality/review classes, the reviewer stays in a different family than the implementer, and effort stays at high. Paste this object over the model_routing section of your quality-loop.config.json, then run setup-models and check-config. See assets/routing/README.md for the dated model menu.

strong_reasoning.note: Floor: planning and risk classes never drop below a strong-tier model.

code_specialized.note: Fallback implementer when the droid leg is unavailable.
Bulk executor. Open-weight GLM via Factory; see README for supply-risk note and non-Chinese fallbacks.

strong_reasoning.note: Cheaper reviewer tier, still a different family than the implementer.

main_session.note: Implementer runs on the droid leg; declared here for the cross-host heterogeneity check.
